birth.place: Sutton Valence, County of Kent, England

residence.place: Sutton Valence, County of Kent, England

notes: Francis Rogers of Dartford. Born 1536 in Sutton Valence, Kent, England. Father: Ralph Rogers (1506-1555, died in Sutton Valence). Mother: Margery Gouldwell/Goldwell (1510-1552, died in Kent). Mother died when Francis was 16, father died when he was 19. Married Alice Benton (1544-1605). Son: Sir Robert Rogers (1565-1639) — a knight. Died 1568 in Hatton, Warwickshire at age 32, when Robert was only 3.
